description:

We provide balls for use during Open-Play hours.

name: Santosha at Hillholm Estate
description: We've recently refurbished the early-'70s clay (Har-Tru) tennis court on our grounds and have added pickleball lines. The court had not been used for nearly a decade, and it is going to take some time to bring it back to pristine condition, but it's getting close and pickleball on clay is super fun! Clay requires a different ball than hard courts. We have paddles and clay balls to sign out. If players would like to bring their own pickleballs, we recommend Onix Pure 2 outdoor balls.
open_play_schedule: Community members can schedule one-hour blocks of court time

Look on the Yarmouth Community Services website for more information.
